_metadata.title: JAWS Position-by-Position Hall of Fame Standards
_metadata.description: Average career WAR, 7-year peak WAR, and JAWS (Jaffe WAR Score) for inducted Hall of Famers at each position. JAWS is calculated as the average of career WAR and 7-year peak WAR. These figures represent the 'bar' that candidates are measured against.

sources.name: FanGraphs JAWS Series by Jay Jaffe
sources.note: Position averages extracted from Jay Jaffe's individual candidate JAWS profiles, each of which includes the 'Avg. HOF [position]' row.

methodology_notes: Position averages include all players inducted as of the 2025 ballot cycle.
For positions with fewer inductees, the JAWS system adds 'average HOF hitters' to equalize sample sizes across positions.
Outfield positions (LF, CF, RF) are tracked separately in the JAWS system. For Negro Leagues players classified generically as 'OF' or 'CF', the CF standard is used as the primary comparison.
Starting pitchers use S-JAWS, a variant that adjusts for the 7-year peak calculation specific to pitching.

C.label: Catcher
C.source: FanGraphs JAWS: Joe Mauer (2024), Brian McCann (2025)

SS.label: Shortstop
SS.source: FanGraphs JAWS: Derek Jeter (2020), Manny Ramirez/A-Rod (2025)

CF.label: Center Field
CF.source: FanGraphs JAWS: Carlos Beltran (2025), Andruw Jones (2026)

P.label: Starting Pitcher
P.source: FanGraphs JAWS: CC Sabathia (2025). Uses S-JAWS variant.
P.note: S-JAWS is the pitcher-specific variant. The 'standard' JAWS for pitchers differs slightly from position player JAWS in its peak calculation.

combined_outfield.label: Outfield (combined LF/CF/RF average)
combined_outfield.note: Simple average of LF, CF, RF standards. Used as the comparison for Negro Leagues players classified generically as 'OF'.
